execOfficers.name: Alexander Jackson
execOfficers.description: The Branch Chair provides vision and direction to the branch through bold leadership.

execOfficers.name: Sebastien Pruneau
execOfficers.description: The Vice Chair manages regular branch operations in support of the Branch Chair.

execOfficers.name: Rachel la Madrid
execOfficers.description: The Secretary serves as the knowledge bank and chief correspondent of the Executive Committee.

execOfficers.name: Elizabeth Horn
execOfficers.description: The Secretary serves as the knowledge bank and chief correspondent of the Executive Committee.

execOfficers.name: Anthony Hurlston
execOfficers.description: The Treasurer is responsible for managing funds and conducting fundraising for the branch.

execOfficers.name: Yuzuria Liu
execOfficers.description: The Activities Director organizes and handles logistics for branch events while also serving as a hospitality host to branch guests.

execOfficers.name: Isaac Castor
execOfficers.description: The Chaplain Provides spiritual support to our branch while keeping the Executive Committee focused on our mission.
